title: Net Curtain Wire and Hooks Set - 3 Meter Curtain wire kit with 4 Eyes & 4 Hooks - A multipurpose wire suitable for net curtains for windows - Durable wire set for window net curtain
features: Great Value Set: Dikots offers 3 Meter curtain wire hooks and eyes so add style to your home without the frustration of multiple purchases of net curtain rod and save you from being stuck in a hardware store.
Premium Built: High quality PVC coated curtain net wire with net curtain hooks provides just right stretch, so no more repeated tightening of curtain cord.
Wide Use: From windows and doorways to party decor and drying clothes; our net wire can serve as curtain & blind accessories, Sharp hooks screw easily into various surfaces.
Quick Installation: Screw net wire hooks into the wall; attach eye bolts to net curtain rail; wire cutter and occasionally a small drill is all you need to attach the wire curtain line.
Durable: Net wire with hooks and eyes is designed to work best to hang light weight curtains or fabric for long-time use.
description: Product Description Hang Clothes Use as a substitute wire for hanging laundry. Birthday Decor Be it birthday or party decor, our curtain wire serves your needs well. Hang Toys Make playtime fun and bedtime easier.
